examples: Some US analysts predict a radical reassessment of US aid flows to Pakistan, including tougher conditionality.
Most will cheer the IMF for introducing flexible loanmaking without onerous conditionality but concerns remain.
It insists on tough conditionality: states being helped will have to provide the fund with collateral and earmarked tax revenue.
Again, a mixture of conditionality and in-work support is needed to make reform effective.
If you were Mario Draghi you would talk a lot about conditionality as well.
